title: Margam and Taibach Advice Surgery - Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg
text_excerpt: Margam and Taibach Advice Surgery - Stephen Kinnock - Labour MP for Aberafan Maesteg Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Aberafan Maesteg Events Better Off Calculator Cost of Living Advice Booklet 2024 Parliament Shadow Minister for Immigration Shadow Minister for the Armed Forces Shadow Minister for Asia and the Pacific News Press & Articles Newsletter Annual Report Campaigns Pride In Place Upper Afan Valley Standing Up For Steel Floating Offshore Wind Contact Here to help Unacceptable Behaviour Policy About GDPR/Data Protection More Search Search the website Search Menu Margam and Taibach Advice Surgery Margam Community Centre I’m holding an advice surgery on Friday 17 April between 3pm and 5pm at Margam Community Centre . My surgeries are by appointment only. You can book an appointment by: Completing this online form Emailing [email protected] Or calling 01639 897660. Bookings will close at 2pm on Wednesday 15 April or unless all slots have been taken. I can help with: Welfare benefits (Personal Independence Payments (PIP), Employment Support Allowance (ESA) and Universal Credit (UC)). Child Maintenance Service (CMS) (formerly the CSA) Immigration (passports and visas) Tax credits (Working Tax Credits and Child Tax Credits) Justice and policing Defence (Armed Forces/Veterans) HMRC Pensions My advice surgeries are for constituents ONLY . If you wish to contact me in my role as Minister of State for Care covering adult social care, primary care, and community care, please email [email protected] Contact details Unit 2 Water Street Business Centre Water Street Port Talbot SA12 6LF Unit 2 Water Street Business Centre Water Street Port Talbot SA12 6LF '> View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of Stephen Kinnock, both at the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
